snippet.description:

snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.‚ÄÇ‚ÄÇ

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don‚Äôt, it‚Äôs GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

Connect with #StreetFighterMovie online:
Website: https://www.streetfightermovie.com/ 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/streetfightermovie/
X: https://x.com/Street_fighter
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/StreetfighterMovie/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@streetfightermovie
Threads: https://www.threads.com/@streetfightermovie

Paramount Pictures Corporation (PPC), a global producer and distributor of filmed entertainment, is a unit of Paramount, a Skydance Corporation (NASDAQ: PSKY), a leading next-generation global media and entertainment company comprised of three business segments: Filmed Entertainment, Direct-to-Consumer, and TV Media. Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

Connect with Paramount Pictures online:
Official Site: http://www.paramount.com/
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@paramountpics
Instagram: http://www.instagram.com/ParamountPics
Twitter: https://twitter.com/paramountpics
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/user/Paramount

en.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
en.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.‚ÄÇ‚ÄÇ

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don‚Äôt, it‚Äôs GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

snippet.title: Krishnavataram vs Ramayana Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Krishnavataram vs Ramayana Trailer Review By Deeksha Sharma. Krishnavataram Part 1: The Heart (Hridayam) Trailer shocked everyone with Mahabharata Presentation & Larger Than Life Vision with Unexpected Emotional Pull & Fresh Face actors which directly challenge Ramayana Ranbir Kapoor & Yash Namit Malhotra Movie Teaser. Starring Siddharth Gupta as Krishna & Sushmitha Bhat as Radha Krishnavataram is Directed by Hardik Gajjar. Does Ramayana really have a competition & Krishnavataram stand out in 2026 Box Office Collection- Leave your Comments below.

Welcome to Orion Esports, where passion meets precision in the world of competitive gaming. Join us on this adrenaline-fueled journey as we carve our mark in the esports realm, fearlessly pushing boundaries and championing excellence.
Our mission is clear: to empower and elevate esports enthusiasts, providing a platform that celebrates skill, strategy, and unbridled determination.

snippet.title: GODZILLA MINUS ZERO | First Look Teaser
snippet.description:
GODZILLA MINUS ZERO
VFX, Written, and Directed by Takashi Yamazaki
In theatres November 6
Follow @godzilla_toho and @GKIDSfilms for more updates!
godzillaminuszero.com

GODZILLA MINUS ZERO picks up in 1949, two years after the tumultuous events of Godzilla Minus One, and continues the story of the Shikishima family as they face an all-new calamity. Additionally confirmed out of CinemaCon, Ryunosuke Kamiki, the hero who faced Godzilla‚Äôs terror in Godzilla Minus One, returns as Koichi Shikishima, and is joined by Minami Hamabe as Noriko Oishi, who miraculously survived Godzilla‚Äôs first attack on Tokyo.

As a project Filmed For IMAX, GODZILLA MINUS ZERO was shot with high-definition digital cameras certified by IMAX, and optimized in sound and imagery unique to IMAX screens. Fans can look forward to seeing Godzilla presented to all new terrifying heights, making GODZILLA MINUS ZERO in a true cinematic event not to be missed.

Godzilla Store: https://godzilla.com/collections/all

For more information regarding Godzilla, check out our other channels:

snippet.title: Focker-In-Law | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
The circle of trust just got bigger. Focker-In-Law is in theaters this Thanksgiving. 
 ______  

This November, comedy icon and Emmy winner Ben Stiller and two-time Oscar¬Æ winner Robert De Niro reunite, joined by Grammy winner and Oscar¬Æ nominee Ariana Grande, in Focker-In-Law, a new chapter in the blockbuster Meet the Parents franchise.
 
Written and directed by John Hamburg, who co-wrote the three previous Meet the Parents films, Focker-In-Law is produced by Oscar¬Æ nominee Jane Rosenthal and Robert De Niro for Tribeca Productions; Ben Stiller and Oscar¬Æ winner John Lesher for Red Hour Films; Emmy winner Jay Roach for Delirious Media; and John Hamburg for Particular Pictures.


Find Focker-In-Law on Instagram at https://www.instagram.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on Facebook at  https://www.facebook.com/fockerinlaw/
Follow Focker-In-Law on X at https://twitter.com/fockerinlaw
Follow Focker-In-Law on TikTok at https://www.tiktok.com/@fockerinlaw
https://www.fockerinlaw.com 

Genre: Comedy
Cast: Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, Ariana Grande, Owen Wilson, Blythe Danner, Teri Polo, Skyler Gisondo, Beanie Feldstein, Eduardo Franco
Written and directed by: John Hamburg
Producers:Jane Rosenthal, Robert De Niro, Ben Stiller, John Lesher, Jay Roach, John Hamburg

snippet.title: Madhuvidhu Trailer | Ajith Vinayaka Films | Vishnu Aravind | Sharaf U Dheen | Kalyani Panicker
snippet.description:
Presenting the trailer Of Madhuvidhu (Malayalam) in Theaters 23rd April 2026.
Directed by Vishnu Aravind, The film stars Sharaf U Dheen & Kalyani Panicker In lead roles, with Music Composed by Hesham Abdul Wahab. 
It Is Produced by Vinayaka Ajith under the Banner of Ajith Vinayaka Films. 
In association with Babu Ettan Films.

Cast:
Sharaf U Dheen
Kalyani Panicker
Jagadhish
Azeez Nedumangadu
Saikumar
Sreejaya
Amal Jose
Sanju Madhu

Banner : Ajith Vinayaka Films
Producer : Vinayaka Ajith
Director : Vishnu Aravind
Co Producers : Santhakumar, Malavika Krishnadas
Story, Screenplay & Dialogue : Bibin Mohan - Jai Vishnu

A Hesham Abdul Wahab Musical

snippet.title: INSIDIOUS: OUT OF THE FURTHER - Official Trailer (4K)
snippet.description:
The Further comes for our world. 
Watch the official trailer for #Insidious: Out Of The Further - exclusively in theatres this August.


Follow us on social: 
https://www.instagram.com/InsidiousMovie   
https://twitter.com/InsidiousMovie  
https://www.facebook.com/InsidiousMovie  

Visit our site: https://insidious.movie 
Subscribe for more exclusive content: https://www.youtube.com/sonypictures 

Having earned over $740 million at the global box office, the Insidious franchise returns with a new family and a terror that redefines what The Further is capable of.
 
In Insidious: Out of the Further, Amelia Eve stars as Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in who discovers she can travel into The Further, the purgatorial realm of lost souls at the heart of the Insidious universe. When something evil comes after her, Gemma discovers an ability that changes everything: she doesn‚Äôt just enter The Further, she can bring what lives there back to the real world. Once the demons realize her power, our world becomes their playground.
 
With Lin Shaye reprising her iconic role as Elise Rainier and Jacob Chase (Come Play) directing, Insidious: Out of the Further opens August 21, 2026. Screenplay by Jacob Chase. Story by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase.      
 
Directed by: 
Jacob Chase  

Screenplay by: 
Jacob Chase

Story by: 
David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick and Jacob Chase

Based on characters created by: 
Leigh Whannell 
                                                                       
Produced by: 
Jason Blum
Oren Peli
James Wan
Leigh Whannell
 
Executive Producers: 
Steven Schneider
Ryan Turek
Brian Kavanaugh-Jones
David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick

Cast: 
Amelia Eve
Brandon Perea
and Lin Shaye

Credits not final

This film is not yet rated by The Motion Picture Association. For future rating information, please visit www.filmratings.com.

snippet.title: Battleground S2 - Official Trailer | Shikhar Dhawan, Khesari Lal, Fukra Insaan, Priyanka, Rahul
snippet.description:
Amazon MX Player presents
Battleground Season 2 - Official Trailer

Starring: Shikhar Dhawan, Fukra Insaan (Abhishek Malhan), Khesarilal Yadav, Priyanka Chahar Choudhary, Rahul Chaudhari
Production House: Rusk Studios
Produced By: Rusk Media
Directed By: Monisha Jaisingh Vaid
Genre: Reality Show, Unscripted

@ThumsUpOfficial presents Battleground Season 2
Activewear Partner: @performaxactivewear 
Comfort Partner: @damensch7036 
Special Partner: @eekenlife3425 
Sunscreen Partner: @fixderma.skincare 
Associate Partner: Sheth Brothers

@shikhardhawan5942 @KhesariMusicWorld  @priyaankachaharchoudhary @FukraInsaan 

About Show: Battleground is here to find India‚Äôs next fitness superstar, with cricket icon Shikhar Dhawan as the Super Selector. Over 5 weeks, 4 teams, and 1 house, 16 contestants will face off in intense physical challenges, earning ‚ÄòCredits‚Äô for themselves and their teams. Only 1 male and 1 female contestant will be crowned as the ultimate fitness champions. Leading the teams are dynamic personalities: Abhishek Malhan, Khesarilal Yadav, Priyanka Chahar Choudhary and Rahul Chaudhari bringing energy and strategy to the game. The contestants will live and train in a Bootcamp-style house, where their mental resilience, endurance, and teamwork will be tested every day. With daily episodes showcasing highlights, challenges, and behind-the-scenes moments, viewers will witness the drama, determination, and grit of each participant. As they push themselves to their limits, only the strongest will make it to the top. Who will become India‚Äôs next fitness superstar? Tune in to find out!

About Amazon MX Player - 
Amazon MX Player is India‚Äôs leading free, premium, ad-supported entertainment platform, offering the biggest collection of web series, movies, reality shows, and international content ‚Äî all available to stream FREE. From blockbuster originals to trending new launches, Amazon MX Player brings you some of India‚Äôs most loved shows like Ek Badnaam Aashram, Bhaukaal, Dharavi Bank, Indori Ishq, Roohaniyat, Chidiya Udd, Hunter, Hey Prabhu!, Battleground, Bindiya Ke Bahubali, Pyar Ka Professor and many more across thriller, romance, comedy, action, and drama genres for all ages. Love international dramas? Explore MX Vdesi, featuring top global hits dubbed in Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu‚Äîincluding audience favourites like Love O2O, My Girlfriend Is An Alien S2, GenZ, Our Secret, Sweet Sweet, My Eyes Are Full of You, Heirs and more. Whether you‚Äôre into binge-worthy thrillers, emotional love stories, laugh-out-loud comedies, or viral international dramas ‚Äî there‚Äôs always something new to watch on Amazon MX Player.

snippet.title: Tateeree Phir Se | Badshah X Simran Jaglan X Hiten | Official Music Video #tateeree
snippet.description:
Where Haryana‚Äôs raw culture meets modern hip hop vibes. Biggest Party Track of the year. This track features Haryana ki Chhorri State level boxing champion Simran Jaglan  ! 

Culture. Strength. Swag.
This is not just a song - it‚Äôs a vibe.

#tateeree   #haryanvisong   #desihiphop   #haryana  #haryanvimusic  #newharyanvisong    

Lyrics :
Ghuti Kyun Ghuti Kyun Kare Tateeree
Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boliye Tateeree
Ghuti Kyun Ghuti Kyun Kare Tateeree
Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boliye Tateeree
Ghuti Kyun Ghuti Kyun Kare Tateeree
Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boliye Tateeree
Ghuti Kyun Ghuti Kyun Kare Tateeree
Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boliye Tateeree

Aaya Badshah rang jamane 
Fir se jalwa dikhane 
Ho mushkil waqt to banda sakht
Hum fir aaye scene banane

Aye Launde Karte Bakbak
Main Shatpratishat Ye Ladke Lag Bhag
Hum Puri Duniya Me Dekho Karte Kartab
Par Ishyo Dilli Hai Marte Dum Tak

Main Hi Sean (Carter) Main Hi (Lil) Wayne
Main Hi Scene Main Hi Game
Mere Khoon Me Hai Jeet 
Dekh Pass Aake Pain
Kalakar Ka Hai Brain
RR Ki Hai Train
Audemars Ka Hai Time, Bulgari Ki Chain
Insaan Insane
Mera Kaam Insane
Do Hi Dost Hai Mere
Mera Pen Mera Pain 
AI Jaisa Brain
Mere Gaane Propane
Mere Sar Pe Hai Crown Mere Mun Pe Hai Fame

Ghuti Kyun Ghuti Kyun Kare Tateeree
Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boliye Tateeree
Ghuti Kyun Ghuti Kyun Kare Tateeree
Kulture King
Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boliye Tateeree

Oh Chora Apni Aayi Pe Aaya Hoya Hai
Panja Race Pe Poora Hi Dabaya Hoya Hai
Inne Gameron Ka Game Bajaya Hoya Hai
Inne Kalle Ne Hi Shishtem (System) Hilaya Hoya Hai

Ye Bin Daanon Ke Challi 
Tu Bhi Nallah Teri Gang Bhi Nalli
Tu Well Connected Politically
Main Well Connected Spiritually
Mainstream Commercial Mein Lyrically
Abhi Underrated Mai Criminally
Inki Dal Nahi Galli Inki Kitni Jalli 
Iss Sal Puri Kar Dunga Tasalli Main

Ghuti Kyun Ghuti Kyun Kare Tateeree
Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boliye Tateeree
Ghuti Kyun Ghuti Kyun Kare Tateeree
Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boliye Tateeree
Ghuti Kyun Ghuti Kyun Kare Tateeree
Kulture King
Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boliye Tateeree
Ghuti Kyun Ghuti Kyun Kare Tateeree
Mhare Ri Mandere Pe Boliye Tateeree

Audio Credits :

‚ûü Lyrics By Badshah & Traditional
‚ûü Composed By Badshah & Traditional
‚ûü Music Produced By Hiten
‚ûü Mixed & Mastered By Hiten
‚ûü Ghatam, Uduku, Zipsy, Ghungru, Bells, Bembo Block played by Dipankar Bhuyan 
‚ûü Desi Bonzo played by Pratap Pandit Ji

snippet.title: Khal Nayak Hoon Main - Lyrical | Sanjay Dutt | Kavita Krishnamurthy | Vinod Rathod
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Khal Nayak Hoon Mein
Movie: Khal Nayak
Singers: Kavita Krishnamurthy, Vinod Rathod
Lyrics: Anand Bakshi
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal

Movie Credits:
Producer: Subhash Ghai
Director: Subhash Ghai
StarCast: Sanjay Dutt, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Raakhee, Anupam Kher

Song Lyrics:

Ji Haan 
Main Hoon Khal Nayak

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu 

Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hai Tu
Is Pyaar Ki Tujhko Kya Kadar
Is Pyaar Ke Kahan Layak Hai Tu

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main

Teri Tabiyat Toh Rangeen Hai 
Par Tu Mohabbat Ki Tauheen Hai

Kuch Bhi Nahi Yaad Iske Siwa
Na Main Kisika Na Koi Mera
Jo Cheez Maangi Nahi Woh Mili
Karta Main Kya Aur Bas Chheen Li
Bas Chheen Li
Bas Chheen Li

Main Bhi Sharafat Se Jeeta Magar
Mujhko Shareefon Se Lagta Tha Darr
Sabko Pata Tha Main Kamzor Hoon
Main Isliye Aaj Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon
Kuch Aur Hoon

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main 
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main
Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hai Tu

Kitne Khilono Se Khela Hai Tu 
Afsos Phir Bhi Akela Hai Tu

Bachpan Mein Likhi Kahani Meri
Kaise Badalti Jawani Meri
Saara Samundar Mere Paas Hai
Ek Boond Paani Meri Pyaas Hai
Meri Pyaas Hai
Meri Pyaas Hai
Dekha Tha Maa Ne Kabhi Pyaar Se
Ab Mil Gayi Woh Bhi Sansaar Se
Main Woh Lootera Hoon Jo Lutt Gaya 
Maa Ka Bhi Aanchal Kahin Chhut Gaya

Nayak Nahi Khal Nayak Hoon Main
Zulmi Bada Dukhdayak Hoon Main
Hai Pyaar Kya Mujhko Kya Khabar
Bas Yaar Nafrat Ke Layak Hoon Main

snippet.title: Tu Tu Hai Wahi | Yeh Vaada Raha (1982) | Rishi Kapoor, Tina Munim | Kishore Kumar, Asha Bhosle Hits
snippet.description:
Relive the magic of true love with ‚ÄúTu Tu Hai Wahi‚Äù, one of the most iconic romantic songs from the film Yeh Vaada Raha (1982). This timeless melody beautifully captures the feeling of rediscovering love and destiny, brought alive on screen by the charming Rishi Kapoor alongside Tina Munim and Poonam Dhillon.

üé∂ Don‚Äôt forget to subscribe for more timeless hits by the legendary Kishore Kumar!  @kishorekumarhitsongs 

Tu Tu Hai Wahi | Yeh Vaada Raha (1982) | Rishi Kapoor, Tina Munim | Kishore Kumar, Asha Bhosle Hits

Song : Tu Tu Hai Wahi 
Movie : Yeh Vaada Raha (1982)
Star Cast : Rishi Kapoor, Tina Munim, Poonam Dhillon
Singer : Kishore Kumar, Asha Bhosle
Music Director : R.D Burman
Lyricist  : Gulshan Baawra

Lyrics:
la la la la la la
la la la la la la
tu tu hai wahi dil ne jise apna kaha
tu hai jaha mai hu vaha
abb toh yeh jina tere bin hai saja
o mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
o mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
phir ho naa juda ha yeh vaada raha
la la la la l la la la la l

mai aawaj hu toh tu hai git meraa
mai aawaj hu toh tu hai git meraa
jaha se niraala manmit meraa
mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
o mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
phir ho naa juda ha yeh vaada raha
tu tu hai wahi dil ne jise apna kaha
tu hai jaha mai hu vaha
abb toh yeh jina tere bin hai saja

kisi mod pe bhi naa yeh saath tute
mere haath se teraa daaman naa chhute
la la la la la la
kabhi khwaab me bhi tu mujhase naa ruthe
mere pyaar ki koyi khushiya naa lute
mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
phir ho naa juda ha yeh vaada raha
tu tu hai wahi dil ne jisse apna kaha
tu hai jaha mai hu vaha
abb toh yeh jina tere bin hai saja

tujhe mai jaha ki najar se chura lu
kahi dil ke kone me tujhko chhupa lu
kabhi jindagi me pade mushkile toh
mujhe tu sambhaale tujhe mai sambhaalu
o mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
o mil jaaye iss tarah do lehre jis tarah
phir ho naa juda ha yeh vaada raha
tu tu hai wahi dil ne jise apna kaha
tu hai jaha mai hu vaha
abb toh yeh jina tere bin hai saja
o la la la la la la
phir ho naa juda ha yeh vaada raha
yeh vaada raha

LYRICS: 
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Balam Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei
Na Hilo Jaye.. Na Chigo
Aaj Meri Chhati Si Toote
Piya Meri Nas Nas Kyun Dookhei...

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Haan Gori Nazar Lagi Deekhei
Ja Sabre Gaam Me Top Lugai Bas Tu Hi Deekhe
Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

Relive the magic of early 2000s romance with O Soniya from Ishq Hai Tumse! Featuring the charming duo Dino Morea and Bipasha Basu, this melodious track is beautifully sung by Udit Narayan and Alka Yagnik, with music composed by Himesh Reshammiya.

Lyrics of O Soniya by Himesh Reshammiya, Udit Narayan, Alka Yagnik:

Laa laa laa laa laa laa laa laa
Laa laa laa laa laa laa laa laa
Feel it
Feel it

Meri chaandi too, mera sona too
Mera hira too, mera panna too

Ishq hai tumse yaaraa tumko nahin khona
Meri nindiya too, mere naina too
Meri duniyaa too, mera chaina too
Jindagi ka guzaara tere bin nahin hona

Jindagi mein tum aa gae
Aa gae, aa gae, aa gae
Dhadakanon pe tum chha gae
Chha gae, chha gae, chha gae
Meri saansen tu meraa darpan tu
O mera sapnaa too, mera apana too
Jindagi ka guzaara tere bin nahin hona
Ishq hai tumse yaaraa tumko nahin khona

I am waiting for you kab se

Credits :

Song: Jane Kyon Log Mohabbat Kiya
Album: Mehboob Ki Mehndi
Artist: Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 



Lyrics :

is zamane me, is mohabat ne
kitne dil tode, kitne ghar phunke
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai
dil ke badale darde dil liya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

tanhayi milti hai, mahafil nahi milti
rahe mahobat me kabhi manzil nahi milti
dil tut jata hai, nakam hota hai
ulfat ye logo ka yahi anjam hota hai
koi kya jane, kyu ye parawane,
kyu machalate hai, gum me jalate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

sawan me aankho ko, kitana rulati hai
furasat me jab dil ko kisi ki yaad aati hai
ye zindagi yu hi barabad hoti hai
har waqt hotho pe koi fariyad hoti hai
na dawao ka naam chalata hai
na duao se kam chalata hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

mahabub se har gum manasub hota hai
din rat ulfat me tamasha khub hota hai
rato se bhi lambe ye pyar ke kise
aashiq sunate hai zafa ye yaar ke kise
bemurawat hai, bewafa hai wo,
us sitamagar ka apne dilwar ka,
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

tanhayi milti hai, mahafil nahi milti
rahe mahobat me kabhi manzil nahi milti
dil tut jata hai, nakam hota hai
ulfat ye logo ka yahi anjam hota hai
koi kya jane, kyu ye parawane,
kyu machalate hai, gum me jalate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
aahe bhar bhar ke diwane jiya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

sawan me aankho ko, kitana rulati hai
furasat me jab dil ko kisi ki yaad aati hai
ye zindagi yu hi barabad hoti hai
har waqt hotho pe koi fariyad hoti hai
na dawao ka naam chalata hai
na duao se kam chalata hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
zahar ye phir bhi sabhi kyu piya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

mahabub se har gum manasub hota hai
din rat ulfat me tamasha khub hota hai
rato se bhi lambe ye pyar ke kise
aashiq sunate hai zafa ye yaar ke kise
bemurawat hai, bewafa hai wo,
us sitamagar ka apne dilwar ka,
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
naam le leke duhayi diya karate hai
jane kyu log mohabat kiya karate hai

snippet.title: Kaash Tu Mera Na Hunda : B Praak Ft. Jyoti Nooran | Parmish Verma | Shera |In Cinemas On 15 May 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records brings you the full video song Kaash Tu Mera Na Hunda from the upcoming Punjabi movie Shera, an emotional journey of love, regret, and the desire to bring someone back.

Featuring Parmish Verma and Sonal Chauhan, this Punjabi song beautifully portrays a husband‚Äôs heartfelt plea to his wife, a desire to fix what‚Äôs broken and relive the moments that once meant everything.

For those who connect with Punjabi sad songs, love failure songs, emotional Punjabi music, and latest Punjabi movie songs, this one will stay with you long after it ends.

Turn up the volume, feel every word, and let the story unfold. üé∂‚ú®

FRANKLIN TRAPPED IN LAVA CITY
Indian Bikes Driving 3D @HeligamerSSS

FRANKLIN TRAPPED IN LAVA CITY
Bikes Driving 3D @HeligamerssS
| Indian
In this intense gameplay of Indian Bikes Driving 3D, Franklin gets trapped inside a dangerous lava-filled city
The entire city is flooded with hot molten lava and buildings are burning everywhere!
As the situation becomes worse,
Spider-Man tries to help Franklin escape, while Hulk stands on top of the building watching the chaos unfold. The city turns into a complete disaster zone and survival becomes almost impossible.
Will Franklin be able to escape from this deadly lava city or is this the end?
Watch till the end for a shocking and action-packed escape!

Lava Flooded City Gameplay

snippet.description:

Flute By: flutepreet

Lyrics:
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani‚Ä¶.
Ohdi paerr chaal suna jad jad v
Maithon bolya na janda ik vaak v
Oh v maukke di nazakat pachaan ke
Sayeon chup kar janda odon aap v
Jado akhiyan da noor howe saawein
Dupatta siron nhiyon lahida 
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani‚Ä¶.

Ohde khyalan diyan pattna te bethi nu
Haye din charde toh pai jandi shaam ni
Utton kuriyan de kaalje machaun nu
Main ohda bullan utte rakhdi aa naam ni
Jado hilda na patta kise paase
Haye odon oda geet gaida
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida
Surmedani‚Ä¶.

Ohde pyaran wala odan bathera eh
Mai kade mehanga leera paya koi khaas ni
Ni mainu maapeyan di yaad aun dindi na
haye odon mukhon jehri duldi mithaas ni
puri dharti de maech da hi lagge 
hun ghera wang di gulai da
Surmedani warga eh mera mahi
Te hor mainu ki chahida.   Surmedani‚Ä¶.

Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚Äî interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚Äî be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚Äù game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚Äù). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

id.title: BERENANG DI KOLAM YANG DIPENUHI HIU...
id.description:
Hari ini aku berenang di kolam renang yang ada hiunya. Pastikan kalian menonton seluruh video untuk mengetahui apa yang terjadi.

Merchandise: https://foltyn.shop/

Gabung ke channel ini untuk mendapatkan akses ke keuntungan:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Media Sosial--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Grup Roblox: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Nama Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX ‚Äî berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun ‚Äî baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

snippet.description:
Sai Baba Patalu Telugu | ‡∞∑‡∞ø‡∞∞‡∞ø‡∞°‡∞ø ‡∞∏‡∞æ‡∞Ø‡∞ø ‡∞®‡∞æ‡∞• ‡∞™‡∞æ‡∞ü‡∞≤‡±Å | Sai Baba Folk Devotional Songs  


Sai Baba Patalu Telugu üôè ‚Äì Listen to the divine and soulful Shirdi Sai Nath devotional songs in this beautiful collection of Sai Baba Folk Devotional Songs. These Telugu bhakti songs are filled with deep devotion, traditional village (Janapada) style music, and powerful lyrics that connect directly to the heart.

This collection of Sri Sai Baba songs is perfect for daily prayers, meditation, and spiritual upliftment. Listening to Sai Baba songs regularly, especially on Thursday (Guruvaram), is believed to remove obstacles, bring peace, and attract blessings of health, wealth, and happiness.
